Gruff-sergeant commando and demolitions-expert mid-charge through plastic volcano-fortress gate as chrome-faceplate terror-commander directs silver-visor troopers from rampart above, backlit smoke billowing.
Pilot-ace commando sprinting across aircraft-carrier deck playset toward waiting plastic fighter-jet, deck-crew articulated-figures waving signal-flags, rotors spinning on background chopper.
All-white ninja-operative leaping mid-air with katana raised toward hooded-cloak terror-commander on plastic catwalk, spark-effect between blades, alarm-lights glowing red below.
Five hand-painted commandos suspended on plastic parachutes mid-descent over jungle-playset diorama, masked-operative leading formation, palm-trees and terror-troopers visible below.
Demolitions-expert commando crouched at glowing plastic-detonator timer inside terror-organization missile-silo playset, mohawk-soldier covering doorway with carbine, countdown digits visible.
Plastic commando-tank crashing through barricade as turret-gunner articulated-figure fires mounted cannon, silver-visor terror-troopers diving behind sandbags, dust-plume erupting.
Arctic-specialist commandos on plastic snowmobiles charging across white terrain toward domed ice-station playset, snake-motif terror-troopers firing from observation tower, snow-spray kicking.
Jungle-specialist commando and masked-operative ascending plastic rope-ladder toward hovering extraction-chopper above playset canopy, resin-smoke billowing below, terror-troopers firing upward.
Motor-pool garage diorama with gruff-sergeant directing as articulated commandos work on plastic-vehicle with hood open, toolbox and jack visible, weapons-rack mounted on wall.
Ninja-operative rappelling from plastic attack-helicopter onto deck of enemy submarine playset, pilot-ace visible in cockpit above, silver-visor troopers scrambling below.

Mohawk-soldier commando aims shoulder-launcher at speeding terror-organization hoverbike, chrome-faceplate commander ducking low, plastic dust-plume trailing across desert diorama, backlit explosion imminent.
Jungle-specialist and masked-operative frozen mid-charge as snake-motif terror-troopers burst from plastic palm-foliage in ambush playset, muzzle-flash effects glowing, resin-vine draped overhead.
All-black ninja-commando mid-sword-lock with serpent-eye-mask terror-commander on volcano-fortress catwalk, twin katanas crossed, spark-effect plastic between blades, troops battling below.
Tank-commander and demolitions-expert articulated-figures leaning over lit holotable in war-room playset, vehicle-micro-minis positioned on tactical map, gruff-sergeant pointing with cigar clenched.
Commando on plastic flying-motorcycle pursuing silver-visor terror-troopers across painted-sky backdrop diorama, contrails streaming, hooded-cloak commander visible on lead hoverbike ahead.

Arctic-specialist commandos lowering on plastic winch-ropes from ceiling-rig into terror-organization launch-bay playset, masked-operative leading descent, alarm-lights flashing red on consoles below.
Pilot-ace commando in plastic-jet cockpit pulling flight-stick with radio-headset visible, missile-lock glowing on dashboard, enemy drone-fighter approaching through canopy, mid-dogfight frozen.
Jungle-specialist and mohawk-soldier cutting zipcuffs off captured commandos inside terror-holding-cell diorama, serpent-eye-mask guard unconscious at console, red alarm-light pulsing overhead.
Demolitions-expert and masked-operative articulated-figures arming up at playset weapons-rack, gruff-sergeant pointing at wall-mounted mission-map, plastic ammo-crates stacked beside toolbox.
Commando-team pouring from back-ramp of plastic amphibious landing-craft onto resin-beach diorama, chrome-faceplate terror-commander directing silver-visor troopers dug behind seawall fortifications.

Tank-commander commando stands in turret-hatch of plastic-tank mid-blast as jungle-specialist crouches beside tread, silver-visor terror-troopers scrambling over sandbag-wall, muzzle-flash glowing orange.

All-white ninja-operative mid-flying-kick toward serpent-eye-mask terror-commander on plastic rooftop diorama, katana extended, hooded-cloak billowing, city-skyline backdrop behind, moonlight spotlight effect.

Gruff-sergeant and arctic-specialist articulated-figures roped-together pulling injured mohawk-soldier up sculpted-rock face playset, plastic rescue-helicopter silhouette hovering above, spotlight beam illuminating.

Demolitions-expert commando leaping clear of tumbling plastic-jeep frozen mid-rollover, debris-pieces suspended, masked-operative rolling aside, chrome-faceplate commander watching from bunker observation-deck above.

Pilot-ace and jungle-specialist commandos suspended on plastic-sling-lines hoisting toward hovering attack-chopper above rooftop playset, snake-motif terror-troopers firing upward, searchlight beam cutting darkness.
